messages.content:
Hope you are doing well. Further to our email below, we have sent the 2022/23 Individual Tax Return package to your HK address at 20D Bella Vista, 3 Ying Fai Terrace, Mid Levels, Hong Kong, but it has been undelivered and returned to our office. Please confirm with us if the address is correct, or advise another postal address you preferred. Thanks. 

check grammar

Hope you are doing well. Further to our email below, we regret to inform you that the 2022/23 Individual Tax Return package we sent to your HK address at 20D Bella Vista, 3 Ying Fai Terrace, Mid Levels, Hong Kong, was undelivered and returned to our office. Please confirm with us whether the address provided is correct or kindly provide us with an alternative postal address. Thank you.

Upon our preliminary review of the information provided, please could you provide the copy of your HKID card so that we can proceed with the preparation of your Hong Kong tax return? Please note that a copy of your HKID card may be requested by the HK Inland Revenue Department in order to create a tax file record for you.

check grammar

Upon our preliminary review of the information provided, we kindly request that you provide a copy of your HKID card to proceed with the preparation of your Hong Kong tax return. Please be aware that the HK Inland Revenue Department may require a copy of your HKID card to establish a tax file record for you.

As discussed, please find below and attached regarding visa matters for your further handling. 

check grammar
As discussed, please find below and attached the details regarding visa matters for your further handling.

please draft a email RE below

We need to ask second page of the property tax assessment as we cannot see the total rental income.

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to request the second page of the property tax assessment, as we are unable to see the total rental income on the document provided.

Could you please provide us with the second page of the property tax assessment so that we can accurately assess the rental income for the relevant period?

We appreciate your prompt assistance in this matter. If you have any questions or require further clarification, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Thank you in advance for your attention to this request.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Another Indian assignee, asked and provided HKID card copy. Revised 56B to correct the full name. 

check sentence
Another Indian assignee has requested and provided a copy of their HKID card. We have revised the 56B form to correct the full name.

We would like to follow up on our below email. Please review the draft reply to the IRD’s enquiry letter in respect of Mr. Ngor, Benny Chun Ming (S/N 43464896). If you are in agreement with our draft reply, please let us have your approval by return email to us as soon as possible. We will then arrange submission to the IRD accordingly.

check grammar

We would like to follow up on our previous email. Please review the draft reply to the IRD's enquiry letter regarding Mr. Ngor, Benny Chun Ming (S/N 43464896). If you agree with our draft reply, please provide your approval by returning an email to us as soon as possible. Once we receive your approval, we will proceed with submitting the response to the IRD accordingly.

Please let us know if you have any questions or concerns. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

We would like to follow up on our below email. Please review the draft reply to the IRD’s enquiry letter regarding Mr. Ngor, Benny Chun Ming (S/N 43464896)’s Hong Kong Salaries Tax for the year of assessment 2021/22. If you are agree with our draft reply, please provide your approval by return email to us as soon as possible. We will then arrange submission to the IRD accordingly. 

check grammar

We would like to follow up on our previous email. Please review the draft reply to the IRD's enquiry letter regarding Mr. Ngor, Benny Chun Ming (S/N 43464896)'s Hong Kong Salaries Tax for the year of assessment 2021/22. If you agree with our draft reply, please provide your approval by returning an email to us as soon as possible. Once we receive your approval, we will proceed with submitting the response to the IRD accordingly.

Please let us know if you have any questions or concerns. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,

Thank you for your reply. 

We will arrange to send you a soft copy of the tax return package via email for your review once it is ready. We may then arrange a call with you if you have any questions regarding the prepared tax return.  

Please note that the IRD only accept the original signed tax return as a valid submission. As such, we will still need to send the original tax return for your signature. Please confirm if we should send the original tax return to your address below. Please also provide your contact number for delivery purpose. 


check the above grammar

Thank you for your reply.

We will arrange to send you a soft copy of the tax return package via email for your review once it is ready. If you have any questions regarding the prepared tax return, we can then schedule a call to address them.

Please be aware that the IRD only accepts the original signed tax return as a valid submission. Therefore, we will still need to send the original tax return to your address. Kindly confirm if we should proceed with sending the original tax return to the address provided below. Additionally, please provide us with your contact number for the delivery purposes.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.

Best regards,

Thank you for your prompt response and your approval of the revised tax computation. 

We noticed that you have provided a donation receipt when you submitted your AboutMe on our GA portal. Please could you confirm if the attached donation receipt is the fourth donation your mentioned in your below email? Thanks

check grammar

Thank you for your prompt response and your approval of the revised tax computation.

We have noticed that you have provided a donation receipt when you submitted your AboutMe on our GA portal. Could you please confirm if the attached donation receipt is the fourth donation you mentioned in your previous email? 

Thank you.

Best regards,
